scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w client && node scripts/pack-shared-for-api.mjs
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client --if-present && npm run lint -w api --if-present
